ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol (e.g., AAPL, MSFT) */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry sector the company operates in */,
  "market" TEXT /* Stock market (e.g., NYSE, NASDAQ) */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the stock is traded (e.g., USD, EUR) */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector in which the company operates */,
  "isin" TEXT /* International Securities Identification Number */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Date of the company's initial public offering */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the company is listed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price data */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock during the day */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock during the day */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of shares traded */,
  "dividend" REAL /* Dividend amount distributed on the date */,
  "split" REAL /* Stock split ratio on the date */,
  "adj_open_price" REAL /* Adjusted opening price for splits and dividends */,
  "adj_high_price" REAL /* Adjusted high price for splits and dividends */,
  "adj_low_price" REAL /* Adjusted low price for splits and dividends */,
  "adj_close_price" REAL /* Adjusted closing price for splits and dividends */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "technical_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each indicator record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the indicator data */,
  "moving_average_50" REAL /* 50-day moving average */,
  "moving_average_200" REAL /* 200-day moving average */,
  "rsi" REAL /* Relative Strength Index (RSI) */,
  "macd" REAL /* Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) */,
  "bollinger_upper" REAL /* Upper Bollinger Band */,
  "bollinger_lower" REAL /* Lower Bollinger Band */,
  "stochastic_oscillator" REAL /* Stochastic Oscillator */,
  "force_index" REAL /* Force Index */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_technical_indicators_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_indices" (
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market index */,
  "index_name" TEXT /* Name of the market index (e.g., S&P 500, Dow Jones Industrial Average) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the market index */,
  "index_provider" TEXT /* Provider of the market index (e.g., S&P, Dow Jones) */,
  "index_type" TEXT /* Type of the market index (e.g., price-weighted, market-capitalization-weighted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "index_components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each index component */,
  "index_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market index */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock that is a component of the index */,
  "weightage" REAL /* Weightage of the stock in the index */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_index_components_index_id FOREIGN KEY ("index_id") REFERENCES market_indices ("index_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_index_components_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., investor, analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization to which the user belongs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., performance, technical analysis) */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., generated, pending, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock related to the news article */,
  "headline" TEXT /* Headline of the news article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date the news article was published */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_screener" (
  "screener_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock screener criterion */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the criterion */,
  "criterion" TEXT /* Criterion for the stock screener (e.g., price, volume, industry) */,
  "operator" TEXT /* Operator for the criterion (e.g., greater than, less than, equals) */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value for the criterion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("screener_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_screener_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_screener_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock screener result */,
  "screener_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock screener criterion */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock that passed the criterion */,
  "passing_criterion" INTEGER /* Whether the stock passed the criterion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_screener_results_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_screener_results_screener_id FOREIGN KEY ("screener_id") REFERENCES stock_screener ("screener_id")
)
